textByHash.051078608ad5c8fd27d3c176ea01fda040a47ac1: I am Bisi. I am the Supreme Commander of the Black Guard.
textByHash.2182f5abd1eba37399ba3c5a26db161a7646e677: But the Black Guard has many regiments across the dwarven realm. All the Commanders of those regiments report to me.
textByHash.24b190bdd8d67958ce2684c38ca8f648f4419bb1: The Red Axe has withdrawn from the city to some unknown location. I believe Commander Veldaban has asked you to assist him in finding their secret headquarters?
textByHash.2c18d89120f405213bb3c9c0990228fcd9ad2ff5: Then I bid you farewell, human.
textByHash.2cdcb36a9bfcec0db1ab5a8ef6ab70429e37fe91: Only of our regiment in Keldagrim, and a most honourable position it is as well.
textByHash.53a69701b7fdaa322972c08170cfb4c09d417bec: Veldaban told me about your involvement in the rebuilding of the statue. Congratulations.
textByHash.565d5ff23ce4cd1742bd20cece07ef04aa50fc54: Well, I heard that you helped Veldaban's father in the mines to the south. That's caused quite a bit of an upset in the Consortium, so I understand.
textByHash.64fb1d258cf0b3b4c60326e9c81e4160649b21bd: I hear you are the human that Veldaban has employed to help rebuild the statue. How is that going?
textByHash.7661d384da31d0268e2bc9540252520616ca1904: Apart from the statue of King Alvis falling down, you mean? I don't know. There is something suspicious about the whole case.
textByHash.79cbcb01b26370063f19bca3c1fc4a3a4fbea991: Apart from that there seems to be some general unrest in the city. Trouble is brewing in Keldagrim.
textByHash.80e38c5212bd8f3cf2cee3fcac729495413c1d4f: We've had several incidents recently. For a while we even closed off the city. And now this.
textByHash.8a06b18fa856218aa2460810cc65906de18c44a9: There seems to be some general unrest in the city. There is trouble brewing in Keldagrim.
textByHash.8d27fbc2dffe8d487d125f92b4f44fa261d11d9d: Apart from you helping to rebuild the statue for the Company?
textByHash.bbcf2084c23d79b9e59f498ae409edc8b8159511: The amount of wealth that goldmine is generating might cause some distortion in the balance of power in the Consortium. But we'll see.
textByHash.d98567070289e4cd5336c92b6ae51a2d06a27bc9: But I'm sure Commander Veldaban is on top of it. He's a very capable officer, and I'm starting to get too old for this sort of thing.
